_description: Bigin CRM contact creation and lookup
_gotchas: Contact lookup by email before creating to avoid duplicates
Phone field accepts any format but clean it for consistency
Company_Name is a text field, not a lookup (Bigin doesn't have a separate Companies module)

_create_contact._curl: curl -s -X POST 'https://www.zohoapis.com/bigin/v2/Contacts' -H 'Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken $BIGIN_ACCESS_TOKEN' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"data": [{"First_Name": "Jane", "Last_Name": "Doe", "Email": "jane@acme.com", "Phone": "+1-512-555-0100", "Company_Name": "Acme Corp", "Title": "VP Marketing"}]}'

_check_before_create._description: Always search by email first to avoid duplicates
